scripts.package:desktop: npm run build && tn package --bundle dist/game.bundle --target desktop --out dist/local-distributable --json && tn validate --bundle dist/local-distributable/desktop/game.bundle --json
scripts.desktop: npm run package:desktop && tar -czf dist/local-distributable/threenative-simple-game-desktop-0.1.0.tar.gz -C dist/local-distributable desktop
